name: xdanswers-extension
description: A script that helps in tests by providing AI-powered answers.

scripts.build:firefox: npm run prebuild:firefox && cross-env TARGET=firefox web-ext build --config .web-ext-config.js && npm run clean
scripts.build:chrome: npm run prebuild:chrome && cross-env TARGET=chrome web-ext build --config .web-ext-config.js && npm run clean
